# GI Copilot Capability Audit

**Date**: 2026-03-12
**Auditor**: Claude (Audit 3 of series)
**Scope**: Full GI system тАФ chat handler, orchestrator, insights, actions, UI

---

## 1. Current System Prompt

**GI has NO system prompt.** The chat endpoint (`src/app/api/gi/chat/route.ts`, 775 lines) is entirely rule-based. There is no LLM call тАФ no Anthropic SDK, no Gemini, no OpenAI. Every response is generated by pattern-matching the user's message against hardcoded regex/string patterns and returning templated responses built from live database queries.

The closest thing to a "personality" is the hardcoded response templates, e.g.:
- Greetings: `"Hey! I'm GI, your operations copilot. I can help with..."`
- Help: `"Here's what I can help you with: ..."`
- Proactive insights use phrases like `"Heads up тАФ"`, `"Something to look into тАФ"`

**There is no LLM anywhere in the GI chat pipeline.**

---

## 2. Database Access

| Data Category | Can Query? | Details |
|---|---|---|
| Tasks | **YES** | Total, active, overdue, review, upcoming, completed, by department, by assignee, stuck, at-risk |
| Deliverables | **YES** | Pending review count, by brand, by status, by platform |
| Team data | **YES** | Team members, workload per person, department stats, active users |
| Signals | **YES** | Recent signals, unprocessed signals, by trend, by velocity |
| Performance | **YES** | Credibility scores, velocity trends, quality trends, on-time rates, streaks, XP |
| Skills | **NO** | Chat handler does NOT load skill files; skill loading is in `gi-skill-engine.ts` (suggestions endpoint only) |
| Content posts | **YES** | Scheduled, draft, published, failed counts |
| Announcements | **YES** | Unread count |
| Articles (Vritti) | **YES** | Total, drafting, published, review |
| Notifications | **YES** | Unread count |
| GI Predictions | **YES** | Active predictions (top 5 by severity) |
| GI Autonomous Actions | **YES** | Pending count, recently executed (24h) |
| GI Learning Logs | **YES** | Active count |
| GI Pattern Logs | **YES** | Last 7 days |
| GI Motivation Profiles | **YES** | Per-user tone preferences, motivators |
| Brands | **YES** | Names, content pipeline, narrative trees |
| Departments | **YES** | Stats, bottlenecks, team size |
| Org-wide stats | **YES** | Users, brands, depts, hiring positions (ADMIN only) |

**Total Prisma tables queried by chat handler**: ~20+ models
**Total Prisma tables queried across all GI files**: ~30+ models

---

## 3. Actions GI Can Take

### Via Chat (Direct Execution)
| Action | Executes? | Tier-Gated? | Trigger Pattern |
|---|---|---|---|
| Reassign task | **YES** | **YES** (Tier 1-2: queued; Tier 3-4: immediate) | `"reassign [task] to [person]"` |
| Extend deadline | **YES** | **YES** | `"extend deadline for [task] by [N] days"` |
| Create task | **YES** | **NO** (always executes) | `"create task: [title]"` or `"create a task [title] assigned to [person]"` |
| Start pipeline | **YES** | **NO** (always executes) | `"start pipeline for [topic]"` |
| Suggest topics | **YES** (read-only) | **NO** | `"what should we cover"`, `"suggest topics"` |

### Via Autonomous Action System (Background)
| Action | How Triggered | Approval Flow |
|---|---|---|
| Escalate stale reviews | GI insight generator detects tasks stuck in REVIEW >48h | Creates `GIAutonomousAction` with tier-based approval |
| Extend at-risk deadlines | GI detects tasks due <24h but not completed | Creates pending action with 48h extension |
| Workload rebalance | GI detects team imbalance (3x median + >=6 tasks) | Creates pending action to move lowest-priority task |

### Via Admin UI (Manual Approval)
| Operation | Endpoint | What It Does |
|---|---|---|
| Approve action | `PATCH /api/gi/actions/[id]` | Executes the queued action (reassign, extend, rebalance) |
| Reject action | `PATCH /api/gi/actions/[id]` | Marks as rejected, no side effects |
| Undo action | `PATCH /api/gi/actions/[id]` | Reverses previously executed action, restores original state |

### Via Event Bus (Reactive)
| Event | GI Response | File |
|---|---|---|
| `PMS_TASK_NEEDS_REVIEW` | Runs `pms/task-reviewer.md` skill, injects review comment + notification | `gi-skill-engine.ts` |
| `PMS_TASK_CREATED` | Upserts department metrics | `gi-skill-engine.ts` |
| `PMS_TASK_STATUS_CHANGED` (тЖТDONE) | Updates department velocity | `gi-skill-engine.ts` |
| `signal.detected` | Loads signal analysis skills | `gi-skill-engine.ts` |
| `signal.breaking` | Loads full workflow skill chain | `gi-skill-engine.ts` |
| `content.published` | Loads analytics skills | `gi-skill-engine.ts` |
| `task.updated` (BLOCKED/OVERDUE) | Loads scenario playbook | `gi-skill-engine.ts` |
| `deliverable.review_requested` | Loads approval workflow | `gi-skill-engine.ts` |

---

## 4. Conversation & Context

| Feature | Status | Details |
|---|---|---|
| Maintains history | **NO** (client-side only) | Messages stored in React state (`gi-assistant.tsx`). Lost on refresh. Server receives only current message. |
| Knows user's name | **PARTIALLY** | Has `userId` from session, queries tasks/credibility by ID. Never fetches `user.name` for personalization. |
| Knows user's role | **YES** | `session.user.role` passed in context. Role-gates responses (ADMIN sees org stats, DEPT_HEAD sees department stats). |
| Knows user's department | **YES** | Looked up via `user.primaryDeptId` for department-scoped queries. |
| Context-aware (current page) | **YES** | `GIContext` provider tracks pathname changes. Sends `currentModule`, `currentView`, `currentEntityId`, `currentEntityType` with every message. |
| Entity-aware | **YES** | If user is on a task page, GI fetches that task's details. Same for signals, brands, narrative trees. |
| Multi-turn understanding | **NO** | Each message is processed independently. No conversation memory. No reference resolution ("this task", "that person"). |

---

## 5. Intelligence Capabilities

| Capability | Status | Details |
|---|---|---|
| Loads skill files | **YES** (suggestions only) | `gi-skill-engine.ts` loads module-specific + role-specific skill files for the `/api/gi/suggestions` endpoint. NOT used in chat. |
| Uses performance data | **YES** | Credibility scores, velocity trends, quality trends, streak data, sentiment scores тАФ all queried and used for insights. |
| Makes proactive suggestions | **YES** | `generateProactiveInsight()` in chat handler checks overdue tasks, bottlenecks, low credibility, critical predictions, etc. Also 23 generators in `gi-engine.ts`. |
| Learns from interactions | **YES** (passive) | `GILearningLog` records peak productivity hours, approval time patterns. `GIPatternLog` tracks velocity/quality trends. No active feedback loop from user responses. |
| Predictive analytics | **YES** | 3 prediction types: `deadline_risk` (historical pace analysis), `capacity_crunch` (throughput vs upcoming), `burnout_risk` (workload + sentiment + quality). Written to `GIPrediction` table. |
| RAG (Knowledge Retrieval) | **EXISTS but NOT WIRED** | `gi-engine-rag-hook.ts` implements semantic search against Vritti knowledge base for content-creation queries. Has `augmentWithRAG()` function. But the chat handler does NOT call it. |

---

**Total GI codebase: ~5,095 lines of TypeScript** (excluding admin pages)

---

## 7. The 23 Insight Generators (`gi-engine.ts`)

Organized by GI maturity tier:

### Baby Tier (Always Active)
1. `generateTaskNudges` тАФ Tasks due today, no active tasks
2. `generateOverdueWarnings` тАФ Overdue task alerts
3. `generateCelebrations` тАФ Weekly completion milestones (5+, 10+), quality celebrations

### Baby Tier (Leader-Only: ADMIN, HEAD_HR, DEPT_HEAD)
4. `generateApprovalAlerts` тАФ Pending reviews in department
5. `generateWorkloadInfo` тАФ Team active tasks + overdue count

### Baby Tier (All Users)
6. `generateLeaderboardNudge` тАФ Credibility ranking + gap to top 3

### Toddler Tier
7. `generateStreakNudge` тАФ Streak save reminders, streak celebrations
8. `generateRebalanceSuggestion` тАФ Workload imbalance detection (leader-only)
9. `generateBottleneckDetection` тАФ Tasks stuck in REVIEW >2d, IN_PROGRESS >5d (leader-only)
10. `generateDashboardContext` тАФ Personal overview on dashboard
11. `generateBoardContext` тАФ Review column + start work nudges on PMS board
12. `generateTaskSequencing` тАФ Priority sequencing, WIP limit nudges
13. `generateContentSchedulingInsight` тАФ Content gaps, upcoming posts, failed posts (Relay module)

### Adolescent Tier
14. `generateVelocityTrend` тАФ Week-over-week completion rate change (+50% celebration, -40% alert)
15. `generateQualityTrend` тАФ On-time delivery rate trend (improving vs declining)
16. `generateTeamCorrelation` тАФ At-risk team members (low credibility + high workload), team velocity drops (leader-only)
17. `generateCrossDeptInsight` тАФ Stalled cross-department dependencies, frequent collaborators (leader-only)
18. `generatePersonalizedMotivation` тАФ Milestone tracking, streak records, recognition tracking (tone-personalized)

### Adult Tier
19. `generateDeadlineRiskPrediction` тАФ Historical pace analysis vs remaining time
20. `generateCapacityCrunchPrediction` тАФ Next week tasks vs 4-week average throughput
21. `generateBurnoutRiskPrediction` тАФ High workload + low sentiment + declining quality (leader-only)
22. `generateAutonomousActionSuggestions` тАФ Creates pending actions for stale reviews, at-risk deadlines, workload imbalance (leader-only)
23. `generateSelfOptimizingInsights` тАФ Learns peak productivity hours, approval patterns, prediction accuracy meta-insights

---

## 8. Tier System

| Tier | Name | Behavior | Default? |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Inform | GI observes and informs user, takes no action | No |
| 2 | Suggest | GI queues action, waits for user approval | **YES** (default) |
| 3 | Act & Notify | GI executes immediately, notifies user after | No |
| 4 | Act Silently | GI executes without notification | No |

Configurable per action type: `task_reassignment`, `deadline_extension`, `workload_rebalance`, `escalation`

---

## 9. What's Missing for "Talking to the User Like Claude Talks to Lavan"

### Critical Gaps

1. **No LLM in chat тАФ this is the #1 gap.** GI responds with template strings, not natural language. It cannot:
   - Understand nuanced questions ("What do you think about our YouTube strategy?")
   - Synthesize information across domains ("Compare our two brands' performance")
   - Reason about tradeoffs ("Should I prioritize the Chaubey video or the election piece?")
   - Have a genuine conversation with follow-up context
   - Express personality, humor, or empathy beyond canned phrases

2. **No conversation memory.** Each message is stateless. GI cannot:
   - Reference earlier messages ("that task I mentioned")
   - Build on prior context ("and what about the other one?")
   - Track what it already told the user
   - Learn user preferences within a conversation

3. **No system prompt = no personality.** Claude has a rich system prompt defining its voice, knowledge, and boundaries. GI has none. It's a glorified chatbot with good data access.

4. **RAG exists but isn't wired.** `gi-engine-rag-hook.ts` has a full implementation for augmenting prompts with CMS history, but the chat handler never calls `augmentWithRAG()`. Content creation queries get no historical context.

5. **Skill files not used in chat.** The 160 skill files are loaded for the suggestions endpoint but never injected into chat responses. GI can't reference editorial guidelines, brand voice, or platform-specific knowledge when talking to the user.

6. **No streaming.** Responses are complete JSON payloads. No typing indicator with real content flowing in.

### Secondary Gaps

7. **No user name in responses.** GI knows `userId` but never greets by name or personalizes the tone by person.

8. **Pattern matching is brittle.** Intent detection uses `message.toLowerCase().includes()` тАФ misses paraphrased queries, typos, and complex questions.

9. **No multi-turn action flow.** "Reassign that task to Aman" works only if the full task name and person name are in one message. Can't do: "Show overdue tasks" тЖТ "Reassign the first one to Aman."

10. **`handleGIQueryWithSkills()` exists but is never called.** This function in `gi-skill-engine.ts` loads module + brand + platform skills and returns them as context тАФ perfect for LLM injection. But the chat route doesn't use it.

11. **No tool/function calling.** If an LLM were integrated, it could use structured tool calls for actions. Currently actions are regex-parsed from natural language тАФ fragile.

### What Would Fix It

To make GI "talk like Claude talks to Lavan":

1. **Wire an LLM** (Anthropic SDK is already in the project) into the chat handler
2. **Build a system prompt** that includes:
   - GI's identity, personality, and behavioral principles (from `/skills/gi/behavioral-principles.md`)
   - Current user's name, role, department
   - Loaded skill file context (via `handleGIQueryWithSkills()`)
   - RAG context (via `augmentWithRAG()`)
   - Current page/module context
   - Summary of recent conversation (last 5-10 messages)
3. **Add tool definitions** for the 5 existing actions (reassign, extend, create, pipeline, suggest)
4. **Persist conversation history** server-side (or at minimum pass last N messages to the LLM)
5. **Stream responses** via SSE or similar

The database access layer is excellent. The action execution system is well-designed with proper tier gating and undo capability. The insight generators are sophisticated. What's missing is the brain that ties it all together.

---

## Summary Scorecard

| Dimension | Score | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Data Access | **9/10** | Queries 30+ models, comprehensive coverage of all modules |
| Action Execution | **8/10** | 5 chat actions + 3 autonomous actions, tier-gated, undoable |
| Insight Generation | **8/10** | 23 generators across 4 maturity tiers, well-structured |
| Predictive Analytics | **7/10** | 3 prediction types with historical analysis, stored in DB |
| Learning System | **6/10** | Passive learning (peak hours, approval patterns), no active feedback |
| Conversational Quality | **2/10** | Rule-based pattern matching, no LLM, no memory, no personality |
| Context Awareness | **7/10** | Page tracking, entity detection, role gating тАФ but not used in responses |
| Skill Integration | **3/10** | Skills loaded for suggestions only, not for chat or actions |
| RAG | **1/10** | Fully implemented but not wired into any endpoint |
| Overall | **5.7/10** | Excellent data + action infrastructure, but the "copilot" is a template engine |
